title: Fix or remove dead code in lichen_coap_status_notify and neighbors_notify
description: The public notify functions in coap_status.c:849 and 863 only log DBG and have comments explaining why they can't trigger observers due to const resources. Either implement using coap_resource_notify (requires removing const from resource defs) or remove if not needed. Scope limited to coap_status.c per task. Follow 3x codereview after every edit chunk. Part of project-LICHEN-dadv codereview-pass3.
